# Standard Reference Layout — L Simple

Reference example for a first L-shaped Standard layout.

## Box

- External dimensions: 150 x 200 x 100 mm
- Material thickness: 3 mm
- Kerf: 0.1 mm

## Internal layout

- One traversing primary horizontal separator
- One partial secondary vertical separator in the upper zone
- Result: one small top-left compartment and one larger L-shaped compartment

## Generated files

- box50-150x200x100-standard-l-simple-layout.svg
- box50-150x200x100-standard-l-simple-cut.svg

## Source layout

- generator/layouts/l-simple-150x200x100.json
